name: OpenAI

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: EU data residency available via eu.api.openai.com (EEA + Switzerland). Both regional storage and regional inference (GPU processing in-region) supported. Requires Zero Data Retention amendment and approved abuse monitoring controls. A pricing uplift applies for some models on data residency endpoints.

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: API data not used for training by default since March 2023. Abuse monitoring logs retained up to 30 days. Zero Data Retention (ZDR) available for eligible enterprise customers.
dataUsage.details: API customers' data is not used for model training by default. ZDR and modified abuse monitoring require enterprise sales approval. Consumer ChatGPT users have a separate opt-out toggle.

euAiAct.details: Holds ISO 42001 (AI Management System) certification. Actively engaged with the EU AI Office on GPAI model obligations. No formal EU AI Act compliance declaration published as of verification date.

notes: EU data controller is OpenAI Ireland Limited (Dublin). Lead supervisory authority is the Irish DPC. DPA is auto-accepted on account creation. EU inference residency (GPU processing in-region) available via eu.api.openai.com. ZDR and data residency require enterprise engagement.
